name: property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate payroll and tax documents cause cash flow gaps. We automate document generation instead of manual data entry into spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll and tax documents due to manual data entry from hotel bookings.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate payroll and tax documents due to manual data entry from hotel bookings.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate payroll and tax documents cause cash flow gaps. We automate document generation instead of manual data entry into spreadsheets.
